Uses of Package
com.documentum.registry

Packages that use com.documentum.registry
Package
Description
com.documentum.com
Provides an interface for accessing the DFC through OLE/COM.
com.documentum.registry
Provides interfaces and classes that manage Documentum information on the client’s local system.
com.documentum.registry.internal
 
  • Classes in com.documentum.registry used by com.documentum.com
    Class
    Description
    IDfClientRegistry
    IDfClientRegistry manages repository object information stored on the local system rather than in the repository server.

    Class
    Description
    DfClientRegistryBase
     
    DfClientRegistryBaseInternal
     
    DfClientRegistryObjectBase
    IDfClientRegistryObject base abstract class
    DfRegistry
    This class provides basic functionality for a platform independent registry storage and retrieval mechanisms.
    DfRegistryKey
     
    IDfAppSupportDocumentInternal
    represents registry information for an application support document.
    IDfCheckedOutObject
    Represents registry information for a checked out object.
    IDfClientRegistry
    IDfClientRegistry manages repository object information stored on the local system rather than in the repository server.
    IDfClientRegistryInternal
     
    IDfClientRegistryObject
    IDfClientRegistryObject is the common base interface for objects written to the client registry.
    IDfHouseKeepingObject
    Created by IntelliJ IDEA.
    IDfInlineDescendantInternal
    Represents registry information for an inline descendant object.
    IDfLocalObject
    IDfLocalObject represents a Desktop Client local file.

    IDfRegistryIniFile
     
    IDfRegistryWin32
     
    IDfViewedObject
    IDfViewedObject represents an object that has been "viewed" in the repository.
